name: Dust of Disappearance
description:
Activate A Interact

This powder shimmers like a thousand tiny motes of light. Activating the dust by sprinkling it on yourself or a creature within reach casts a 4th-rank spell with a duration of 1 minute on that creature. This invisibility can't be negated or seen through by any spell of 3rd rank or lower or any item of 5th level or lower.
